blended.narrative: Silver Mountain is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 2,976 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 7 inches total. Mild temps with highs near 52°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Friday: 2.1" of snow, highs of 45°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 10.4" of new snow over the past week. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 30".
